                },
                "original_img_height": 400,
                "original_img_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HAyI1-aaAAQO4KL.jpg",
                "original_img_width": 1000
              },
              "media_key": "3_2021140793650708484"
            },
            "content": {
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5qs5t",
                  "text": "most people think they're organized.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5b5ke",
                  "text": "they have their Google Drive. their Notion. their Obsidian vault. folders inside of folders inside of folders.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "d41bd",
                  "text": "and they feel productive because everything is \"in its place.\"",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2s6ff",
                  "text": "but here's the uncomfortable truth:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 40,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "do0uu",
                  "text": "every single one of those files is dead.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "fc4r1",
                  "text": "and dead files are costing you more than you realize.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "e5864",
                  "text": "I. what is a dead file?",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 3,
                      "offset": 128,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "5b3g1",
                  "text": "a dead file is any file that sits somewhere — your laptop, Google Drive, Dropbox, wherever — and does absolutely nothing unless you, the human, manually open it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3dfm3",
                  "text": "think about it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7aqmi",
                  "text": "that business plan you wrote 4 months ago? dead.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dfo2q",
                  "text": "that spreadsheet tracking your revenue? dead.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "at4h2",
                  "text": "that SOP you spent 3 hours writing for your team? also dead.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5418d",
                  "text": "unless a human is actively staring at it, the file does nothing. it doesn't serve as context. it can't be improved. it can't be referenced. it can't make decisions. it can't be combined with other files to produce insights.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4k114",
                  "text": "it just sits there. collecting digital dust.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "c2nin",
                  "text": "and this is how 99% of people manage their files in 2026.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "d3u1r",
                  "text": "the same way we managed files in 2006.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a8cj3",
                  "text": "II. the real cost of dead files",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5ucmb",
                  "text": "here's what most people don't see.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "cgrpl",
                  "text": "every time you do a deep research inside of ChatGPT or Perplexity — and let's be honest, you probably do this multiple times per day — the results live inside your chat history.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "qeo4",
                  "text": "and then what happens?",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7mm8u",
                  "text": "you forget about it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3d5i4",
                  "text": "you move on. you start a new chat. and that research? gone. buried under 200 other conversations you'll never scroll back to find.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9iv7c",
                  "text": "so next week, when you need the same information, you run the exact same search again. same question. same results. same wasted time.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2hjo5",
                  "text": "this is the dead file problem at scale.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 48,
                      "offset": 63,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "8f44r",
                  "text": "it's not just about files sitting on your computer. it's about every piece of valuable information you generate disappearing into the void of chat histories, browser tabs, and forgotten bookmarks.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "fq8hc",
                  "text": "the average knowledge worker repeats the same research 3-5x because they never properly store the results.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "937on",
                  "text": "and they don't even realize they're doing it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3me57",
                  "text": "III. enter: living files",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "88asi",
                  "text": "a living file is fundamentally different.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "eeefa",
                  "text": "a living file is any file that exists in an environment where a powerful AI agent can:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "eag59",
                  "text": "access it at any time without you being present",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "68k1k",
                  "text": "modify it and improve it autonomously",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 17,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "agu2v",
                  "text": "use it as context for making decisions",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 12,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "1cq31",
                  "text": "reference it when completing tasks",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 13,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "79e5p",
                  "text": "build upon it by combining it with other files",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 8,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "b6nm9",
                  "text": "share it with other agents or systems",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2udbl",
                  "text": "this is not a small upgrade. this is a completely different paradigm for how information works.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bbaci",
                  "text": "here's the simplest way to understand it:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "ej6rp",
                  "text": "dead file = a document on your laptop. it exists, but it's inert. it does nothing unless you open it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 11,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "1gb3i",
                  "text": "living file = a markdown file on a VPS that your AI agent reads, references, updates, and acts on — 24/7, whether you're awake or not.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ak163",
                  "text": "the difference isn't the file format.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 14,
                      "offset": 18,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 26,
                      "offset": 37,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "fdp1o",
                  "text": "the difference is where it lives and what can interact with it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9g94p",
                  "text": "IV. why this changes everything",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ajoef",
                  "text": "let me give you a concrete example.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "sbuf",
                  "text": "let's say you do a deep research on the best supplement stack for sleep. you spend 20 minutes reading through results. great insights. very useful.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 12,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "dhvom",
                  "text": "the old way: that research lives in your Perplexity chat history. you maybe screenshot it. maybe copy-paste it into a note. probably forget about it in 48 hours.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 21,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "fm4po",
                  "text": "the living files way: you tell your AI agent to save the results as a markdown file. done. now that file lives on your VPS. and here's what happens next:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4tal3",
                  "text": "your agent can reference that research anytime health or supplements come up in conversation.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2e08r",
                  "text": "if new information comes out about sleep supplements, your agent can update that file.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "52stv",
                  "text": "if you ask your agent to plan your evening routine, it already has context on what supplements you take and when.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "920vq",
                  "text": "one file. saved once. pays dividends forever.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f9iqm",
                  "text": "and this is the key insight most people miss:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 62,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "2uplm",
                  "text": "every hour you spend building out your living files compounds. every piece of context you give your AI agent makes it permanently smarter. not for one conversation — forever.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8fo4s",
                  "text": "this is the opposite of ChatGPT, where every conversation starts from zero.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "d9sc7",
                  "text": "V. the verbalization problem",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7hbl2",
                  "text": "here's where it gets interesting — and where most people get stuck.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 56,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "dvl05",
                  "text": "to create powerful living files, you need to be able to verbalize your thoughts clearly.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8gbne",
                  "text": "your preferences. your judgment. your goals. your problems. your taste. the way you want things done.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ebfqb",
                  "text": "all of it needs to be articulated in plain english and saved as structured files.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dqp6i",
                  "text": "and most people are terrible at this.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5ufhs",
                  "text": "not because they're stupid. but because they've never had to do it before. there was never a reason to write down \"here is exactly how I like my emails written\" or \"here is my decision-making framework for evaluating business opportunities.\"",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2ptb3",
                  "text": "but now there is.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8jh1a",
                  "text": "because if you cannot verbalize it, you cannot automate it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2rggg",
                  "text": "the person who can clearly articulate their thinking into clean, structured markdown files will have AI agents that feel like an extension of themselves.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "e43dk",
                  "text": "the person who can't will keep asking ChatGPT the same surface-level questions and wondering why AI \"isn't that useful.\"",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 91,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "b6ut0",
                  "text": "the ability to verbalize your thoughts is becoming one of the most valuable skills of 2026. and the way you practice it is deceptively simple — writing. speaking. articulating. refining.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "56t0n",
                  "text": "VI. dead files vs. living files — the gap is exponential",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9kbi",
                  "text": "let me be blunt about something.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2q15r",
                  "text": "the difference between a beginner using a free ChatGPT account and a power user running AI agents with a fully built-out living file system is not 2x.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "cqatn",
                  "text": "it's not even 10x.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "b6i8i",
                  "text": "it's closer to 100x — and the gap is widening every single month.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6imij",
                  "text": "the beginner opens ChatGPT, types \"when was Abraham Lincoln born,\" and thinks they're using AI.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "befgm",
                  "text": "the power user has AI agents that:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "65n3a",
                  "text": "— know their business goals, revenue targets, and current bottlenecks — have access to their calendar, email, and communication channels — reference a library of markdown files covering everything from SOPs to personal preferences — can make decisions, take actions, and report back autonomously — improve themselves over time as more context is added",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5gjfg",
                  "text": "same technology. completely different universe of outcomes.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "desjn",
                  "text": "and the only difference? one person invested the time to build out their living files. the other didn't.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6r14l",
                  "text": "VII. how to start building your living files today",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "74doh",
                  "text": "you don't need to overhaul your entire system overnight.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 8,
                      "offset": 24,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 37,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "c6b2a",
                  "text": "start with two folders: personal and business.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "94mt6",
                  "text": "in each folder, create markdown files for:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "4kq46",
                  "text": "personal:— goals (short-term and long-term) — preferences (communication style, schedule, routines) — health context (supplements, exercise, diet) — key relationships and recurring commitments",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 9,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "8rtt3",
                  "text": "business:— current goals and revenue targets — team structure and who handles what — biggest problems you're currently solving — SOPs and playbooks for recurring tasks — lessons learned and mistakes to avoid",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "al6jv",
                  "text": "then, every time you do a web search or deep research that produces useful results — don't let it die in your chat history. save it as a markdown file.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6vt25",
                  "text": "every time your AI agent makes a mistake — document it so it never happens again.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6bmev",
                  "text": "every time you realize \"I wish my agent knew this about me\" — write it down and add it to the system.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7bsbr",
                  "text": "this is not a one-time setup. it's an ongoing process. and every single addition makes the entire system more powerful.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "b5j9e",
                  "text": "VIII. the future is obvious",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "artru",
                  "text": "here's what's coming — and it's closer than most people think.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f8hut",
                  "text": "every serious professional will have their own AI agent running on a VPS.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4dttm",
                  "text": "every serious company will have a shared AI agent that the whole team can access — with a living file system containing company docs, goals, financials, and operational playbooks.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "76a1v",
                  "text": "individual agents will communicate with the company agent. the company agent will communicate with individual agents. information will flow between living files seamlessly.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "q6dk",
                  "text": "a single person with a well-built living file system will outperform a team of 10 who are still emailing PDFs back and forth.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "crnar",
                  "text": "this is not science fiction. the technology exists today. the only bottleneck is whether you sit down and build it.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "37vev",
                  "text": "IX. the bottom line",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "1g7h3",
                  "text": "your files are either working for you or they're collecting dust.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dbrp6",
                  "text": "there is no in-between.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4c86l",
                  "text": "every document on your Google Drive that can't be accessed by an AI agent is a dead file. every insight buried in your ChatGPT history is wasted knowledge. every preference you haven't articulated is a task you can't automate.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8sp7",
                  "text": "the shift from dead files to living files is not optional for anyone who's serious about building in the AI era.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7c1t8",
                  "text": "it's the difference between using AI as a search engine and using AI as a force multiplier.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "454ie",
                  "text": "and the people who figure this out first will have a compounding advantage that only grows over time.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5d1r5",
                  "text": "i built and sold my AI startup for $1.8 million in 14 months.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2fbsq",
                  "text": "now i run a startup accelerator helping founders build AI companies from scratch.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8o1ek",
                  "text": "if you're serious about building an AI business — not just using AI, but building a real company around it — i take on a small number of founders each cohort.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {
                    "urls": [
                      {
                        "fromIndex": 27,
                        "text": "scalesoftware.ai/start",
                        "toIndex": 49
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ev4e8",
                  "text": "apply here if you want in: scalesoftware.ai/start",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                }
              ],
              "entityMap": []
            },
            "media_entities": []
          },
          "twitter_card": "tweet",
          "color": null,
          "provider": "twitter"
        }
      }
    },

    "a4f606488aa1fb6db75217b478599ac1c970deb735b1d2159c809d580d6b7c1c": {
      "expiresAtEpochMs": 1771495414435,
      "value": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "OK",
        "tweet": {
          "url": "https://x.com/alexcooldev/status/2020883184922324994",
          "id": "2020883184922324994",
          "text": "",
          "raw_text": {
            "text": "https://t.co/ycmigL6sct",
            "facets": []
          },
          "author": {
            "id": "1591276020090671104",
            "name": "Alex Nguyen",
            "screen_name": "alexcooldev",
            "avatar_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1889005902797385729/udjSMRAj_200x200.jpg",
            "banner_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_banners/1591276020090671104/1680896034",
            "description": "Built an AI study note tool → 370k users, $24K/month 🤙 Built an AI medical assistant → 10k users, $4k/month ✌️",
            "location": "HCMC Vietnam",
            "url": "https://x.com/alexcooldev",
            "followers": 52444,
            "following": 620,
            "joined": "Sat Nov 12 03:45:59 +0000 2022",
            "likes": 14918,
            "media_count": 508,
            "protected": false,
            "website": null,
            "tweets": 5531,
            "avatar_color": null
          },
          "replies": 23,
          "retweets": 72,
          "likes": 820,
          "bookmarks": 1979,
          "created_at": "Mon Feb 09 15:31:12 +0000 2026",
          "created_timestamp": 1770651072,
          "possibly_sensitive": false,
          "views": 59025,
          "is_note_tweet": false,
          "community_note": null,
          "lang": null,
          "replying_to": null,
          "replying_to_status": null,
          "source": "Twitter Web App",
          "article": {
            "created_at": "2026-02-09T15:31:12.000Z",
            "modified_at": "2026-02-09T15:31:12.000Z",
            "id": "2020881819969916928",
            "title": "How To Generate AI Influencers That Actually Look Real ",
            "preview_text": "How To Generate AI Influencers That Actually Look Real\nIf your AI Influencers still look fake or “too perfect”,\nit’s not the model’s fault.\nIt’s your prompt.\nAI models like Grok Imagine, Kling 3.0,",
            "cover_media": {
              "id": "QVBJTWVkaWE6DAAFCgABHAueV+tbsAAKAAIWFVkb/RoQAAAA",
              "media_id": "2020882958253797376",
              "media_info": {
                "__typename": "ApiImage",
                "color_info": {
                  "palette": [
                    {
                      "percentage": 47.43,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 25,
                        "green": 28,
                        "red": 31
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 34.18,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 135,
                        "green": 135,
                        "red": 135
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 15.93,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 202,
                        "green": 187,
                        "red": 188
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 1.69,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 64,
                        "green": 91,
                        "red": 112
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 1.23,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 69,
                        "green": 47,
                        "red": 34
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "original_img_height": 540,
                "original_img_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HAueV-tbsAAZf72.jpg",
                "original_img_width": 1351
              },
              "media_key": "3_2020882958253797376"
            },
            "content": {
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "1s6ev",
                  "text": "How To Generate AI Influencers That Actually Look Real",
                  "type": "header-one"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 21,
                      "offset": 62,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "fknp7",
                  "text": "If your AI Influencers still look fake or “too perfect”,\nit’s not the model’s fault.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "49ed2",
                  "text": "It’s your prompt.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a99j0",
                  "text": "AI models like Grok Imagine, Kling 3.0, Seedance,\nthey’re all v powerful but… only if you talk to it the right way.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 7,
                      "offset": 33,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "cus7e",
                  "text": "And they’re all available inside Arcads so you don’t have to jump around.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "i6vc",
                  "text": "See, most people prompt it like they’re describing art.\nThat’s the fastest way to get AI-looking results.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 19,
                      "offset": 12,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 6,
                      "offset": 130,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "a4ups",
                  "text": "If you want real AI Influencers – the kind that blend naturally into TikTok, Reels, or Shorts – you need to prompt the LLM like a system, not a vibe.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 14,
                      "offset": 14,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "gu4d",
                  "text": "This is where JSON prompting works best (example at the end).",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 45,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "5pp83",
                  "text": "Why Grok Imagine + Arcads Is a Powerful Combo",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8g9an",
                  "text": "Arcads gives you:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "69pu5",
                  "text": "A fast workflow for AI creators",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dk2ts",
                  "text": "Easy iteration for influencer content",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "61rd5",
                  "text": "Distribution-ready assets",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4jged",
                  "text": "Grok Imagine gives you:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "e3ktt",
                  "text": "High-fidelity human generation",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3b5np",
                  "text": "Strong realism when structured properly",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "c1jec",
                  "text": "Consistent output when guided with constraints",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 23,
                      "offset": 39,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "fsj5a",
                  "text": "Together, they’re perfect for building AI Influencers at scale.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 54,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "ae07r",
                  "text": "The Core Rule for AI Influencers: Reality > Perfection",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9029f",
                  "text": "Real AI Influencers don’t look like fashion models.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4dfpq",
                  "text": "They look like:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "edp3g",
                  "text": "Someone filming content in their kitchen",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ctska",
                  "text": "A casual mirror selfie",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6gu40",
                  "text": "A creator adjusting their outfit mid-recording",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "5vlfn",
                  "text": "Slightly imperfect, slightly awkward",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 35,
                      "offset": 11,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "vsru",
                  "text": "That’s why imperfection is your biggest weapon.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 34,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "34m2m",
                  "text": "The Prompting Framework That Works",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a0upt",
                  "text": "When using Grok Imagine or Kling 3.0 inside Arcads, structure matters more than creativity.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 10,
                      "offset": 18,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "5h5ip",
                  "text": "A good prompt has two layers:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 32,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "9jblo",
                  "text": "Structured visual details (JSON)",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 23,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "c22r2",
                  "text": "Clear generation intent",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 24,
                      "offset": 24,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 25,
                      "offset": 53,
                      "style": "Italic"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "dhhth",
                  "text": "This tells Grok exactly who the AI Influencer is and how real they should feel.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 36,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "etq9p",
                  "text": "1. Visual Details: Lock the Identity",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "civ35",
                  "text": "Instead of:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8v6h9",
                  "text": "“A beautiful influencer”",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a7s45",
                  "text": "Define:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8eqe7",
                  "text": "Age group",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f1663",
                  "text": "Ethnicity",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "c7hi7",
                  "text": "Hairstyle",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9ba39",
                  "text": "Expression",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "88g69",
                  "text": "Outfit details",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4n626",
                  "text": "Jewelry and tattoos",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 21,
                      "offset": 40,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "1n53p",
                  "text": "This is how you turn an AI face into an AI Influencer persona.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 33,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "32kh0",
                  "text": "2. Environment Sells the Illusion",

                },
                {
                  "data": {},

                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 13,
                      "offset": 29,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "c5s1f",
                  "text": "Faces don’t convince people.\nContext does.",

                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "1gv4r",

                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ahd8u",

                },

                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],

                      "length": 42,

                },

                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],

                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],

                  "key": "pgne",
                  "text": "You’re building influencer content… not stock photos.",

                  "inlineStyleRanges": [

                      "length": 54,

                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],

                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "31n5",
                  "text": "\"image_generation_prompt\": \"Hyper-realistic photo, natural indoor lighting, smartphone camera feel, imperfect framing, visible skin texture, candid moment, looks like a real AI Influencer content creator, not staged, not studio\"",

                },
                {
                  "data": {},

                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],

                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "egs8k",
                  "text": "Result:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 0,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a9vnj",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 43,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "7dbi7",
                  "text": "Why This Works for AI Influencers in Arcads",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "delar",
                  "text": "JSON removes ambiguity",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ftc2a",
                  "text": "Real environments kill the “AI smell”",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8vaq5",
                  "text": "Imperfections build trust",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "40hie",
                  "text": "Reusable structure = scalable AI Influencer farms",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "84lte",
                  "text": "This prompt format works especially well when generating:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4dfvr",
                  "text": "AI product reviewers",

                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],

                  "text": "AI UGC creators",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "74te0",
                  "text": "AI TikTok & Reels influencers",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 13,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "7s012",
                  "text": "Final Thought",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "nk7m",
                  "text": "If you want AI Influencers that actually convert:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8qb6b",
                  "text": "Stop prompting Grok like an artist",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "852ro",
                  "text": "Start prompting it like an engineer",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 1,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 102
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 25,
                      "offset": 75,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "2rc3q",
                  "text": "Inside Arcads, Grok Imagine becomes more than an image model, it becomes a real AI Influencer engine. 🚀",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },

                  "data": {},

                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],

                  "text": "PS: Huge thanks to Arcads for sponsoring our efforts 💪",

                }

                "description": "Built an AI study note tool → 370k users, $24K/month 🤙 https://t.co/rNhDgb5YRP Built an AI medical assistant → 10k users, $4k/month ✌️ https://t.co/svEUoAjYpt",
