    "ea40b58fce4fe93111ae3733fdf75f8003295afd10a5e20bda51eb0a3c922f06": {
      "expiresAtEpochMs": 1771495422351,
      "value": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "OK",
        "tweet": {
          "url": "https://x.com/leonabboud/status/2020821834296414279",
          "id": "2020821834296414279",
          "text": "",
          "raw_text": {
            "text": "https://t.co/3N3yKXHP9k",
            "facets": []
          },
          "author": {
            "id": "1477231808337137664",
            "name": "Leon Abboud",
            "screen_name": "leonabboud",
            "avatar_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1984277015252389888/d1RYwTrM_200x200.jpg",
            "banner_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_banners/1477231808337137664/1767772053",
            "description": "Founder & CEO at Unfungible | More business and crypto marketing content on YouTube:",
            "location": "Apply to work with us → ",
            "url": "https://x.com/leonabboud",
            "followers": 25506,
            "following": 3262,
            "joined": "Sat Jan 01 10:54:55 +0000 2022",
            "likes": 114058,
            "media_count": 3432,
            "protected": false,
            "website": {
              "url": "http://www.unfungible.xyz",
              "display_url": "unfungible.xyz"
            },
            "tweets": 86264,
            "avatar_color": null
          },
          "replies": 60,
          "retweets": 115,
          "likes": 1204,
          "bookmarks": 2662,
          "created_at": "Mon Feb 09 11:27:25 +0000 2026",
          "created_timestamp": 1770636445,
          "possibly_sensitive": false,
          "views": 103123,
          "is_note_tweet": false,
          "community_note": null,
          "lang": null,
          "replying_to": null,
          "replying_to_status": null,
          "source": "Twitter Web App",
          "article": {
            "created_at": "2026-02-09T11:27:24.000Z",
            "modified_at": "2026-02-09T11:27:24.000Z",
            "id": "2020554113080340480",
            "title": "I built a Marketing Supercomputer with Claude Code (Full Guide)",
            "preview_text": "I put the greatest marketing minds in history inside my laptop, here’s how. What if you could ask Elon Musk about how he would go about building a monopoly in your industry?\nWhat if you could ask Alex",
            "cover_media": {
              "id": "QVBJTWVkaWE6DAAFCgABHAp669KawAAKAAIUgC6AwtfQAAAA",
              "media_id": "2020562536098349056",
              "media_info": {
                "__typename": "ApiImage",
                "color_info": {
                  "palette": [
                    {
                      "percentage": 72.9,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 36,
                        "green": 36,
                        "red": 36
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 10.89,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 0,
                        "green": 0,
                        "red": 254
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 6.3,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 85,
                        "green": 118,
                        "red": 215
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 2.71,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 216,
                        "green": 224,
                        "red": 246
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 2.1,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 53,
                        "green": 193,
                        "red": 244
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "original_img_height": 768,
                "original_img_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HAp669KawAAsBwD.jpg",
                "original_img_width": 1920
              },
              "media_key": "3_2020562536098349056"
            },
            "content": {
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "32cc",
                  "text": "I put the greatest marketing minds in history inside my laptop, here’s how. What if you could ask Elon Musk about how he would go about building a monopoly in your industry?",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ek6hi",
                  "text": "What if you could ask Alex Hormozi to pressure test your pricing strategy before your next launch?",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ea1kk",
                  "text": "What if you could ask Seth Godin to evaluate your positioning, or get Jeff Bezos to give you direct leadership feedback on how you conducted the last quarterly meeting?",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "95u55",
                  "text": "All of this is possible today. And I'm going to show you exactly how I set it up.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ajm8g",
                  "text": "I'm not talking about asking GPT to \"write like Hormozi.\" That gives you a watered down, surface level imitation of what the AI thinks Hormozi would say.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "201da",
                  "text": "I'm talking about something fundamentally different.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a6mkg",
                  "text": "I pulled thousands of hours of content from the greatest marketing minds who have ever lived. Their books, podcasts, interviews, keynotes. Every example, every nuance, every story, every framework they've ever shared publicly on the internet.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "chnp7",
                  "text": "Then I fed all of it into a system that lets me call on any of them, on demand, whenever I need strategic guidance.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "en93n",
                  "text": "The result is a Marketing Supercomputer. And it lives on my desktop.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "40l0q",
                  "text": "Let me show you how it works and how you can build your own.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "btuv7",
                  "text": "How the Marketing Supercomputer works",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7non2",
                  "text": "There are hundreds of thousands of hours of wisdom from the world’s best thinkers on YouTube right now.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "57l6a",
                  "text": "Alex Hormozi alone has published hundreds of hours of content breaking down offers, pricing, scaling, and lead generation. Elon Musk has thousands of speeches, interviews, and writings scattered across the internet. Warren Buffett has countless records of speeches and leadership memos he’s shared whose wisdom you can tap into.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bj6e1",
                  "text": "The problem is that no human being can consume, retain, and cross reference all of this.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "c3oho",
                  "text": "This is the gap that the Marketing Supercomputer fills.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2nm1l",
                  "text": "The Three Pieces You Need",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ac0e9",
                  "text": "The system has three layers:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7m4s2",
                  "text": "OpenClaw scrapes the YouTube transcripts",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2l0aj",
                  "text": "Claude Code organizes and extracts the frameworks",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8jlgl",
                  "text": "Skills turn each thinker into a callable advisor",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7sctn",
                  "text": "That's it. Let me walk you through each one.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bvhu2",
                  "text": "Step 1: Access the Knowledge (OpenClaw + YouTube)",
                  "type": "header-one"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3pduc",
                  "text": "First step is getting OpenClaw to go and fetch the transcriptions of all the content from your chosen thinkers. Pick one to start off with, let’s say Alex Hormozi.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "cclkq",
                  "text": "Open OpenClaw and give it this prompt:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3tk5r",
                  "text": "\"Go to [YouTube channel URL]. Scrape every video transcript from this channel. Save each transcript as a separate text file with the video title as the filename.\"",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "cf53q",
                  "text": "Then do the same for their guest appearances:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4oa6n",
                  "text": "\"Search YouTube for 'Alex Hormozi interview' and 'Alex Hormozi podcast.' Scrape the transcripts from the top 50 results. Save each one as a separate text file.\"",
                  "type": "blockquote"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4u2m",
                  "text": "For example, in less than 1h, OpenClaw got me 206 pages of transcripts when I asked it for my video transcripts from last year.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 0,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f9jg5",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3mjdd",
                  "text": "Now that you have your transcripts, this is your gun powder. Now you need the cannon.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f7bil",
                  "text": "Step 2: Build Your Folder Structure",
                  "type": "header-one"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4us91",
                  "text": "Before you touch Claude Code, get your folders organized. This takes two minutes and saves you from chaos later.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "fsd89",
                  "text": "Create these folders on your computer. If you get stuck anywhere here just ask Claude.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7g68s",
                  "text": "marketing-supercomputer/",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "58c96",
                  "text": "├── hormozi/",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "67a22",
                  "text": "         ├── scripts/ ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4am5s",
                  "text": "         ├── output/",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ch1ra",
                  "text": "         ├── extracted/ ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 1,
                      "length": 13,
                      "offset": 12
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "648hv",
                  "text": "        └── CLAUDE dot md",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 2,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7pr7s",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "cjc6a",
                  "text": "Create as many folders as advisors whose content you’ll be uploading.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "e1gum",
                  "text": "Drop all the pulled transcripts into each thinker's transcripts folder.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9kpmj",
                  "text": "Now create the CLAUDE dot md file. This is the most important part of the entire system.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2aqo0",
                  "text": "CLAUDE dot md is a text file that Claude Code reads automatically every time you open a session in that folder. Think of it as the brief you'd give a brilliant new hire on their first day. It tells Claude who you are, what you need, and exactly how you want the work done.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4irl1",
                  "text": "Here's the exact CLAUDE dot md I use for my folders. Copy this and change the details to fit your business:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "fo4q",
                  "text": "\"I am [your name], founder of [your company]. I sell [your offer] to [your audience].",
                  "type": "blockquote"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "37urb",
                  "text": "This folder contains transcripts from Alex Hormozi's videos, podcasts, and guest appearances.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bdftn",
                  "text": "Your job is to extract, not summarize.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "17r8h",
                  "text": "For every distinct framework, mental model, or repeatable principle you find:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bln11",
                  "text": "Name it using Hormozi’s own terminology. State the core principle in one sentence. Include a direct quote from the transcript. Explain the underlying psychology of why it works. Show me specifically how I can apply this to [your specific business context].\"",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "c6h8c",
                  "text": "Create a CLAUDE DOT md for each thinker. Same structure, just swap the name and adjust the context based on what that thinker specializes in.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 41,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "2606d",
                  "text": "Step 3: Build Your Advisors (Claude Code)",
                  "type": "header-one"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f5546",
                  "text": "Open the Claude desktop app. Go to Projects. Create a new one called \"Hormozi Brain\" or whatever thinker you're starting with.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bse0o",
                  "text": "Paste your CLAUDE dot md into the Project Instructions section. Upload all your transcripts into Project Knowledge. That's your setup done.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2t302",
                  "text": "Every conversation you have inside this project now has full access to everything you've uploaded.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "e9qki",
                  "text": "Now open a chat and hit it with this:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ej3v0",
                  "text": "\"Read every transcript I've uploaded. Extract every distinct framework, methodology, mental model, and repeatable principle. Follow the extraction format I gave you in the project instructions. If you find frameworks that connect to each other, note the relationship.\"",
                  "type": "blockquote"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ervo3",
                  "text": "Now here's where it gets powerful.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "vram",
                  "text": "Take those extracted frameworks and turn them into an advisor. An advisor is a set of instructions that tells Claude how to think when you ask it a specific type of question. Think of each one as a different expert sitting in your office, ready to review your work the moment you ask.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7dj4h",
                  "text": "Here's the template I use. Copy it, swap in whatever thinker you're building for:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4clpu",
                  "text": "\"You are a strategic advisor trained on [Thinker Name]'s complete body of work. When I ask you a question in your area of expertise, apply the specific frameworks, principles, and mental models extracted from their content. Score my work against their methodology, 1 to 10 on each dimension. Identify the weakest element and explain why using their reasoning, not generic advice. When rewriting or improving my work, reference the specific principle you're applying. Push back on me if I'm making a mistake that this thinker has explicitly warned against. Every recommendation must be grounded in something they've actually taught and referenced using their own words.\"",
                  "type": "blockquote"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f3ldk",
                  "text": "Build one for every thinker on your list. Extract the frameworks, build the advisor. Once they're all set, your supercomputer is live.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 32,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "35svd",
                  "text": "What This Looks Like in Practice",
                  "type": "header-one"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "et20g",
                  "text": "As I was writing this article, I was finalizing the landing page for a new product we're launching. I'd written the copy myself with the help of Claude. It felt decent but something wasn't clicking.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2rbl3",
                  "text": "So I opened the supercomputer and ran it through my advisor Miller who specializes in brand messaging and storytelling",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2lpur",
                  "text": "The Miller advisor scored the messaging a 6 out of 10. The problem: I was leading with what the product does instead of what the customer is struggling with. The hero of the page was my product. It should have been the founder reading it. The villain was buried three paragraphs down when it should have been in the first line.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "538pi",
                  "text": "It then tore the headline apart. Too clever and not specific enough it said. It rewrote it into something that would stop a founder mid scroll because it spoke directly to what they're losing by not acting.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3i816",
                  "text": "I rewrote the page. Then ran a test with Claude asking for honest ratings between the former page and the new one.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dha0a",
                  "text": "Former was scored at 7/10, new was a 9/10.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bh14p",
                  "text": "All thanks to my supercomputer.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 22,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "f13ne",
                  "text": "The Compounding Effect",
                  "type": "header-one"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "20c4q",
                  "text": "Right now, everyone in your industry is using the same generic AI that is spewing the same repeatable slop.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2k30o",
                  "text": "You now have a system trained on the actual teachings of the greatest minds in your field, structured around your specific business, answering your specific questions with frameworks most people don't even know exist.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dbc8p",
                  "text": "The greatest business minds in history gave away their life's work for free on the internet. And now it’s yours to use.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ecb4f",
                  "text": "Build the supercomputer. Become unstoppable.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                }
              ],
              "entityMap": [
                {
                  "key": "0",
                  "value": {
                    "data": {
                      "entityKey": "8b3354de-fd21-4bdb-8efd-6c8591b1f0b0",
                      "mediaItems": [
                        {
                          "localMediaId": "1",

    "93fc30b5851f48d4f6584075dc6743abbdb5ef617b6dcbb0d5aaecce90b9cf0f": {
      "expiresAtEpochMs": 1771495431259,
      "value": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "OK",
        "tweet": {
          "url": "https://x.com/vargastartup/status/2020985580860092419",
          "id": "2020985580860092419",
          "text": "Hired OpenClaw 🦞 to watch TikTok 24/7 \n\n- installation took 2 minutes\n- it watched 100 videos in couple minutes\n- now I have all trends every five minutes\n\nIt doesn’t sleep, cost $200/mo and I hired two already",
          "raw_text": {
            "text": "Hired OpenClaw 🦞 to watch TikTok 24/7 \n\n- installation took 2 minutes\n- it watched 100 videos in couple minutes\n- now I have all trends every five minutes\n\nIt doesn’t sleep, cost $200/mo and I hired two already https://t.co/lxaLZ9hnJl",
            "facets": [
              {
                "type": "media",
                "indices": [
                  211,
                  234
                ],
                "id": "2020985333702373376",
                "display": "pic.x.com/lxaLZ9hnJl",

              "url": "https://linktr.ee/shnai",
              "display_url": "linktr.ee/shnai"
            },
            "tweets": 7139,
            "avatar_color": null
          },
          "replies": 21,
          "retweets": 42,
          "likes": 608,
          "bookmarks": 1701,
          "created_at": "Tue Feb 10 10:04:09 +0000 2026",
          "created_timestamp": 1770717849,
          "possibly_sensitive": false,
          "views": 58384,
          "is_note_tweet": false,
          "community_note": null,
          "lang": null,
          "replying_to": null,
          "replying_to_status": null,
          "source": "Twitter Web App",
          "article": {
            "created_at": "2026-02-10T10:04:09.000Z",
            "modified_at": "2026-02-10T10:04:09.000Z",
            "id": "2018227859555512320",
            "title": "I automated all our content creation using OpenClaw: Reddit + Semrush + AWS + GitHub + GSC ",
            "preview_text": "Before: 2M impressions per month \n1800+ articles & pages \n3 people writing content\nAfter: 1 bot named \"Ink\"\nCost: ~$1-5 per piece (still hard to count)\nTools connected and account given:  \nReddit, HN",
            "cover_media": {
              "id": "QVBJTWVkaWE6DAAFCgABHANn9MtbgAAKAAIAAAAAGRxVKgAA",
              "media_id": "2018571359073566720",
              "media_info": {
                "__typename": "ApiImage",
                "color_info": {
                  "palette": [
                    {
                      "percentage": 98.61,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 253,
                        "green": 252,
                        "red": 252
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 0.69,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 83,
                        "green": 148,
                        "red": 56
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 0.38,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 147,
                        "green": 143,
                        "red": 142
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      "percentage": 0.32,
                      "rgb": {
                        "blue": 160,
                        "green": 196,
                        "red": 145
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "original_img_height": 951,
                "original_img_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HANn9MtbgAATObj.jpg",
                "original_img_width": 2378
              },
              "media_key": "3_2018571359073566720"
            },
            "content": {
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 8,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 3,
                      "offset": 55,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 6,
                      "offset": 83,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    },
                    {
                      "length": 5,
                      "offset": 108,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "dhojb",
                  "text": "Before: 2M impressions per month \n1800+ articles & pages \n3 people writing content\nAfter: 1 bot named \"Ink\"\nCost: ~$1-5 per piece (still hard to count)",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 36,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "3n928",
                  "text": "Tools connected and account given:  ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8uqh0",
                  "text": "Reddit, HN - content ideas daily",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ditrn",
                  "text": "GitHub - access to our repo for existing content and to push new one",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4j2o9",
                  "text": "AWS - upload images ",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "eq97p",
                  "text": "Semrush - check keywords volume difficulty",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dp77a",
                  "text": "GSC- indexing ",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 22,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "f7ar6",
                  "text": "Papermark website has:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8g59k",
                  "text": "1270 articles (on different languages)",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "avliu",
                  "text": "400 help and customer stories ",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "bduam",
                  "text": "140 pages",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "a88dg",
                  "text": "What I wanted to achieve ",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 57,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "3gbkd",
                  "text": "1. I do not need to open computer anymore/all from mobile\nWe have a 6 months old at home, every time you need to open computer this is the whole event. Babies looooove screens. So, I wanted for long time to have possibility to manage everything through phone.  ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 100,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "3trip",
                  "text": "2. Content created based on existing formats and instructions are followed and automatically updated\nWhen I give feedback, Ink updates its own instructions. Next article is better. It was always a problem, to repeat multiple time for content creation before,",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 69,
                      "offset": 1,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "2qj6b",
                  "text": "\n3. Real stories/case studies found in Reddit or Hacker News, Twitter  always come up with some ideas for content, but I want smth on more permanent bases, that bot bring ideas based on news. Particularly because news is one of the best performing and mentioned content types.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "du36a",
                  "text": "Set up ",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8bp8g",
                  "text": "There are multiple detailed articles how to set up your clawdbot, so I am not gonna write much about it but will share a bit more on how the workflow with content bot works.  ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9ceok",
                  "text": "Ink's (My bot) Workflow",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "50apl",
                  "text": "Here's what happens when I send a keyword:",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "74f81",
                  "text": "I send a keyword/or Ink send it to me via Telegram",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "437v7",
                  "text": "Check keyword difficulty and volume in Semrush",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4fv76",
                  "text": "Ink decides the format of article or content type: page, blog, help",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "esk24",
                  "text": "Ink decided on subtype of blog/page",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "1uqc8",
                  "text": "It creates the content following detailed guidelines",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "29qks",
                  "text": "Takes screenshots of every tool mentioned or product",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3lp4m",
                  "text": "Uploads images to our separate repository",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dub7q",
                  "text": "Commits to GitHub, opens a PR",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "d5l9g",
                  "text": "Waits for Vercel preview to build",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 4,
                      "offset": 9,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "ft5rl",
                  "text": "Sends me only the preview link",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "eve6v",
                  "text": "I review on my phone, reply with feedback",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6n6dh",
                  "text": "We iterate until approved",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8inr5",
                  "text": "Index it in GSC when it pushed",
                  "type": "ordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "df1aa",
                  "text": "Step 1-2: Keywords",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "dqiqr",
                  "text": "For now I set it two ways either I send keyword, or it send based on the recent news in Reddit, Hacker News and related to our product. The second is done via browser. \nFurther it checks in Semrush keywords difficulty and volume ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 0,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "av1pb",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 7,
                      "offset": 66,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "4ip9p",
                  "text": "After there is decision we update existing or make new content. \n\nProblem: It is not yet ideal, as it often miss smth in the repo and not find all articles for the topic.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f246t",
                  "text": "Step 3-5: Ink decides on format and create content",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "68kc4",
                  "text": "There are two level, first format of content like page or article. Second is type of the articlr/page. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "ab58u",
                  "text": "I provide instructions and GitHub access to all our repo with all article.  That way the bot can decide which article format how.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 1,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3rhm4",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {
                    "urls": [
                      {
                        "fromIndex": 59,
                        "text": "WORKFLOW.md",
                        "toIndex": 70
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4ird8",
                  "text": "All content instructions are in here Content Instructions (WORKFLOW.md)",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "flc7n",
                  "text": "Step 6. Select or take screenshots",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "8dca5",
                  "text": "Either it select among existing images from existing articles via GitHub or create new. \nNee screenshots are kind of hardest part. I mainly use screenshots in articles of real tools or our tool, so the goal to make full setup of images. Currently I have a lot of troubles here. \n1. Low quality\n2. Wrong formats and sizes\n3. Cookie banner avoiding\nSo we evolved from screenshots like that: ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 2,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "eu9ma",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9gu9j",
                  "text": "To screenshots like that ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 3,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "d9hj3",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "eau74",
                  "text": "To finally get me listened Iswitched from Sonnet to Opus. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 4,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "31f47",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 7,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "8lckq",
                  "text": "Problem: It is not deterministic it still make a lot of mistakes on screenshots",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2iv5a",
                  "text": "Step 7. Upload images to our AWS",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "65nhp",
                  "text": "We have a separate website connected to our AWS bucket to add screenshots for website, now it is accessible via browser by bot. Very comfortable.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 5,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2j4lp",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "66d0n",
                  "text": "Step 8-10 Commits, Vercel builds and Preview",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "f3nul",
                  "text": "So next step is commit it, I am not getting text send to me before. As I want to see full article in mdx format live, because it also can be broken if smth with mdx formatting happens ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 6,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "3ltv1",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "b47v3",
                  "text": "I still did not deligate it to other bot, mainly because for now I want the process be more solid and see the result myself improving the instructions. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 23,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "fd5r2",
                  "text": "Step 11. Iteration loop",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "g5pf",
                  "text": "This currently takes most of time, Ink sending me preview link, I comment and it improves it, and building again preview, and than again and again. And of course updating instructions. But it really takes most of time now. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "e4t3e",
                  "text": "Telegram easily became my most used app on the phone",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 7,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "c2lts",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "6qs8n",
                  "text": "Step 12. Indexing",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "2m9m4",
                  "text": "Last step is index what was already pushed and live. This is essential as I dont even need to think. If the new content indexed or not ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [
                    {
                      "key": 8,
                      "length": 1,
                      "offset": 0
                    }
                  ],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "1fbvc",
                  "text": " ",
                  "type": "atomic"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "9u77c",
                  "text": "Results",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "24lvf",
                  "text": "Content done by Ink, instead of person ",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "aqtup",
                  "text": "We did not loose on quality ",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "d7738",
                  "text": "I can do 90% from phone from Telegram",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "27vu8",
                  "text": "Ink gets better, but not full automation",
                  "type": "unordered-list-item"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "7vsg6",
                  "text": "What still can be improved?",
                  "type": "header-two"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 12,
                      "offset": 3,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "fsiui",
                  "text": "1. Screenshots ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "4rsdb",
                  "text": "This is still a huge pain, mistakes in formats in selecting existing images, so I need to do I think separate skill just for images. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 23,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "brqj8",
                  "text": "2.  Setting up schedule",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "317u3",
                  "text": "I am not sure, but it can not remind me to do anything, so probably I need to set cron job or smth like that. I did not do anything here yet. Like for example every day it send me the news and related topic from reddit. Now it is done from my request.",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 48,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "6t9u5",
                  "text": "3. Better connect product and marketing project. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "fj02p",
                  "text": "Despite Papermark repo is open , it still not navigating via it good enough. Images not taken properly. So I feel like I am missing smth here in connecting two repos. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 26,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }
                  ],
                  "key": "885gu",
                  "text": "4. Decrease my review time",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [],
                  "key": "80f9p",
                  "text": "I still invest a lot of time, I dont know if it is set up or what, and maybe I need to set other bot for review as many of people recommend it here. ",
                  "type": "unstyled"
                },
                {
                  "data": {},
                  "entityRanges": [],
                  "inlineStyleRanges": [
                    {
                      "length": 18,
                      "offset": 0,
                      "style": "Bold"
                    }

            "card": null,
            "place": {},
            "entities": {
              "hashtags": [],

              "urls": [
                {
                  "display_url": "x.com/i/article/2018…",

                    0,

              "user_mentions": []
            },
            "isRetweet": false,

    "56af2379dfb93eef6c719ed3908765827b20dd8247eb7b97b822959e89c95cde": {
      "expiresAtEpochMs": 1771495435644,
      "value": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "OK",
        "tweet": {
          "url": "https://x.com/crystalsssup/status/2021149326290956353",
          "id": "2021149326290956353",
          "text": "Kimi K2.5 + Seedance 2 is a perfect workflow.  \n\nOne prompt = A 100MB Excel storyboard generated with images and prompts, which you can use in seedance.  \n\nI just tested with Hitchcock's Psycho iconic shower scene. My prompt:   \n\nI would like to create a derivative work of the shower murder scene from Psycho. Could you provide a storyboard breakdown, including the prompt for each shot, and generate previews for me? Please present this in a table and give me an Excel file.",
          "raw_text": {
            "text": "Kimi K2.5 + Seedance 2 is a perfect workflow.  \n\nOne prompt = A 100MB Excel storyboard generated with images and prompts, which you can use in seedance.  \n\nI just tested with Hitchcock's Psycho iconic shower scene. My prompt:   \n\nI would like to create a derivative work of the shower murder scene from Psycho. Could you provide a storyboard breakdown, including the prompt for each shot, and generate previews for me? Please present this in a table and give me an Excel file.",
            "facets": [
              {
                "type": "media",
                "indices": [
                  278,
                  301
                ],
                "id": "2021149079456399360",
                "display": "pic.x.com/5VZShxKjUx",
                "original": "https://t.co/5VZShxKjUx",
                "replacement": "https://x.com/crystalsssup/status/2021149326290956353/photo/1"
              }
            ]
          },
          "author": {
            "id": "1801279481321238528",
            "name": "Crystal",
            "screen_name": "crystalsssup",
            "avatar_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2017077042395959307/Weh0_Alq_200x200.jpg",
            "banner_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_banners/1801279481321238528/1769744419",
            "description": "@Kimi_Moonshot Staff.\n\nPersonality goes a long way. \n\nBe useful.",

    "cfe71f51e72296ad0c146ee3d28c43c892b780b89adc74e99124336a087577e4": {
      "expiresAtEpochMs": 1771495436764,
      "value": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "OK",
        "tweet": {
          "url": "https://x.com/dharmesh/status/2018224922582032649",
          "id": "2018224922582032649",
          "text": "Just registered clawspot .ai (no website yet).\n\nHere's the idea:\n\nSetup a multi-tenant OpenClaw server making it easy for normies to setup an OpenClaw bot with core cloud-based features.\n\nThinking: GMail, Google Docs, Web Search, X/Twitter, long-term memory, server-based local working directory (to save files and such).\n\nWould let people try out the power of OpenClaw with less of the headache of setup and such.\n\nSomebody's probably already working on something like this so going to sleep now (it's 2:30am) and see what kind of comments this post gets.",
          "raw_text": {
            "text": "Just registered clawspot .ai (no website yet).\n\nHere's the idea:\n\nSetup a multi-tenant OpenClaw server making it easy for normies to setup an OpenClaw bot with core cloud-based features.\n\nThinking: GMail, Google Docs, Web Search, X/Twitter, long-term memory, server-based local working directory (to save files and such).\n\nWould let people try out the power of OpenClaw with less of the headache of setup and such.\n\nSomebody's probably already working on something like this so going to sleep now (it's 2:30am) and see what kind of comments this post gets.",
            "facets": []
          },
          "author": {
            "id": "14260608",
            "name": "dharmesh",
            "screen_name": "dharmesh",
            "avatar_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1323776407521185793/He3iubHL_200x200.jpg",
            "banner_url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_banners/14260608/1613275258",
            "description": "Co-founder/CTO, HubSpot ($HUBS).\n\nMission: Help millions grow better.\n\nPublish newsletter (2M+ subscribers).\n\nBuilder:",
            "location": "Boston, MA",
            "url": "https://x.com/dharmesh",
            "followers": 338201,
            "following": 768,
            "joined": "Sun Mar 30 20:05:08 +0000 2008",
            "likes": 3096,
            "media_count": 490,
            "protected": false,
            "website": {
              "url": "http://dharme.sh/dharmeshtb",
              "display_url": "dharme.sh/dharmeshtb"
            },
            "tweets": 23529,
            "avatar_color": null
          },
          "replies": 179,
          "retweets": 26,
          "likes": 626,
          "bookmarks": 404,
